markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Recalibrate strategy and align on content quality standards for promptfoo's AI security content.](https://fathom.video/share/6ExiP9imZ_81EAfGhTe2eBt9c6-pdU7E?tab=summary&timestamp=17.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX Labs presented their improved content generation process, emphasizing better research and customization capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/6ExiP9imZ_81EAfGhTe2eBt9c6-pdU7E?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)
  - [promptfoo stressed the need for higher quality over quantity, with a focus on matching in-house technical writing standards](https://fathom.video/share/6ExiP9imZ_81EAfGhTe2eBt9c6-pdU7E?tab=summary&timestamp=781.0)
  - [Both parties agreed to collaborate more closely, with promptfoo providing more upfront guidance and GrowthX Labs refining their approach](https://fathom.video/share/6ExiP9imZ_81EAfGhTe2eBt9c6-pdU7E?tab=summary&timestamp=1666.0)

## Topics

### Content Generation Process Improvements

  - [New system can process 1000+ URLs/keywords, clustering topics effectively](https://fathom.video/share/6ExiP9imZ_81EAfGhTe2eBt9c6-pdU7E?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
  - [Custom research guidance allows for specific source selection and filtering](https://fathom.video/share/6ExiP9imZ_81EAfGhTe2eBt9c6-pdU7E?tab=summary&timestamp=473.0)
  - [Outline generation with customizable sections for each article](https://fathom.video/share/6ExiP9imZ_81EAfGhTe2eBt9c6-pdU7E?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)
  - [Post-processing capabilities to refine tone, style, and format](https://fathom.video/share/6ExiP9imZ_81EAfGhTe2eBt9c6-pdU7E?tab=summary&timestamp=517.0)

### Quality Standards and Expectations

  - [promptfoo's benchmark: content should take 1/4 to 1/8 of the time to review compared to writing from scratch](https://fathom.video/share/6ExiP9imZ_81EAfGhTe2eBt9c6-pdU7E?tab=summary&timestamp=879.0)
  - [Focus on shorter, LLM-specific content with recent (post-Sept 2023) case studies](https://fathom.video/share/6ExiP9imZ_81EAfGhTe2eBt9c6-pdU7E?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)
  - [Content should reflect industry accurately and resonate with promptfoo's technical audience](https://fathom.video/share/6ExiP9imZ_81EAfGhTe2eBt9c6-pdU7E?tab=summary&timestamp=937.0)
  - [Goal: minimize cognitive load for promptfoo team during review process](https://fathom.video/share/6ExiP9imZ_81EAfGhTe2eBt9c6-pdU7E?tab=summary&timestamp=1283.0)

### Strategy Alignment

  - [promptfoo emphasized quality over quantity, suggesting a focus on "nailing" 1-2 articles rather than producing high volume](https://fathom.video/share/6ExiP9imZ_81EAfGhTe2eBt9c6-pdU7E?tab=summary&timestamp=1219.0)
  - [GrowthX Labs proposed a "seed planting" approach with quality MVPs, but promptfoo stressed maintaining high standards](https://fathom.video/share/6ExiP9imZ_81EAfGhTe2eBt9c6-pdU7E?tab=summary&timestamp=1488.0)
  - [Baseline for quality should be promptfoo's existing documentation, not competitor content](https://fathom.video/share/6ExiP9imZ_81EAfGhTe2eBt9c6-pdU7E?tab=summary&timestamp=1542.0)
  - [Discussion on balancing technical accuracy for both security and LLM experts](https://fathom.video/share/6ExiP9imZ_81EAfGhTe2eBt9c6-pdU7E?tab=summary&timestamp=1578.0)

### Collaboration and Communication

  - [Agreement to use shared channel more frequently for async communication](https://fathom.video/share/6ExiP9imZ_81EAfGhTe2eBt9c6-pdU7E?tab=summary&timestamp=1784.0)
  - [promptfoo offered to provide more upfront guidance and feedback on outlines/drafts](https://fathom.video/share/6ExiP9imZ_81EAfGhTe2eBt9c6-pdU7E?tab=summary&timestamp=1775.0)
  - [GrowthX Labs committed to refining their process based on promptfoo's existing content and guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/6ExiP9imZ_81EAfGhTe2eBt9c6-pdU7E?tab=summary&timestamp=1703.0)

### Customer Success Feedback

  - [promptfoo praised GrowthX Labs' customer service, communication, and responsiveness](https://fathom.video/share/6ExiP9imZ_81EAfGhTe2eBt9c6-pdU7E?tab=summary&timestamp=1834.0)
  - [Acknowledged strong performance in organization, focus, and feedback reception](https://fathom.video/share/6ExiP9imZ_81EAfGhTe2eBt9c6-pdU7E?tab=summary&timestamp=1848.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX Labs to rework process, anchoring more on promptfoo's existing documentation](https://fathom.video/share/6ExiP9imZ_81EAfGhTe2eBt9c6-pdU7E?tab=summary&timestamp=1666.0)
  - [Aim to get at least one high-quality piece approved and published this week](https://fathom.video/share/6ExiP9imZ_81EAfGhTe2eBt9c6-pdU7E?tab=summary&timestamp=1694.0)
  - [promptfoo to provide more detailed guidelines on their quality standards and key topics](https://fathom.video/share/6ExiP9imZ_81EAfGhTe2eBt9c6-pdU7E?tab=summary&timestamp=1719.0)
  - [Increase async communication in shared channel for faster feedback and alignment](https://fathom.video/share/6ExiP9imZ_81EAfGhTe2eBt9c6-pdU7E?tab=summary&timestamp=1784.0)
  - [GrowthX Labs to refine persona and quality criteria based on promptfoo's input](https://fathom.video/share/6ExiP9imZ_81EAfGhTe2eBt9c6-pdU7E?tab=summary&timestamp=1666.0)
  - [Consider expanding into broader AI security topics after establishing consistent quality](https://fathom.video/share/6ExiP9imZ_81EAfGhTe2eBt9c6-pdU7E?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
